page_content:
LARC330 Urban Design Studio (5 Credits)

The landscape architect's role within the interdisciplinary urban design process, focusing on urban site design issues. Pedestrian friendly site design and the future of sustainable development will be studied. Prerequisite: LARC411 and LARC231.

Corequisite: LARC412.

Restriction: Junior standing or higher; and must be in Landscape Architecture program.

Credit Only Granted for. LARC330 or LARC440.
